name: [KranzTV] YouTube API Avg Latency > 5s
message:
YouTube API average latency exceeds 5 seconds over the last 15 minutes. Channel builds may feel sluggish or time out.

Note: Upgrade to p95 monitoring after RUM-generated metrics are configured (Phase 4).

Check the [Reliability Dashboard](https://app.datadoghq.com/dashboard/mr2-f6c-cbc/kranztv--reliability) for latency breakdown by endpoint.

@alex.rosenkranz@gmail.com
